globalSettings.siteTitle: Sentiment Tattoo Studio | Fine Line & Custom Tattoos in Győr
globalSettings.metaDescription: Sentiment Tattoo Studio by Regina Árvai in Győr, Hungary. Elegant, minimalist, fine line, and custom tattoos with personal sentiment and taste. Start a conversation and create art.

homepage.title: Sentiment Tattoo Studio | Ink as Intimate as Memory
homepage.description: Premium luxury tattoo experience. Specializing in delicate fine line shading and custom designs by Regina Árvai in Győr, Hungary. Timeless art on skin.

about.title: About Regina Árvai | Sentiment Tattoo Studio
about.description: Meet Regina Árvai, the artist behind Sentiment. Learn about her unique approach to translating personal stories and emotions into delicate fine line tattoos.

gallery.title: Tattoo Gallery & Available Flash | Sentiment
gallery.description: Explore the portfolio of delicate custom tattoos and discover currently available exclusive flash designs by Regina Árvai. Book your favorite design.

booking.title: Booking Inquiry & Consultations | Sentiment
booking.description: Initiate your tattoo journey. Submit your ideas, references, and design wishes directly to schedule a custom session or design consultation with Regina Árvai.

info.title: Booking Info, Pricing & Studio Policies | Sentiment
info.description: Essential studio guidelines. Learn about our booking deposits, general pricing for minis and large tattoos, custom design consultations, and studio policies.
